name: Cavatelli with Spicy Tomato-Sausage Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Reserved juice from canned tomatoes (or water)
2 tbsp Fresh basil, chopped (1 1/2 tsp dried)
recipeInstructions:
PREPARATION: For The Sauce
1. Make the Quick Tomato Sauce.
2. Remove casing from sausage.
3. Heat olive oil in a large frying pan over medium heat; sauté sausage, breaking into small pieces, until color turns pale and sausage is just cooked through, about 10 minutes.
4. Add the Quick Tomato Sauce, basil, and tomato juice; simmer, uncovered, over low heat for 5 minutes. Sauce can be made 1 day ahead.
COOKING AND SERVING
1. Cook the pasta in 4 quarts boiling, salted water until just tender, about 8 minutes.
2. Drain well.
3. Reheat the sauce.
4. Toss the pasta with sauce.
5. Serve on warmed serving dishes.
6. Garnish each serving with 3 tablespoons ricotta.
Makes 4 servings.
